commands.command: Runtime project-local publish adapter executes ledger operation; no Agent CLI authority
commands.success: every applicable operation uniquely confirmed by provider fact and artifact digest
commands.failure: missing gate/credential, explicit failure, partial/uncertain/zero/multi/conflict or unverifiable fact never reports success

operations.expected_identity: main commit equals approved release commit
operations.query: read exact main ref and Louke CI / required conclusion
operations.verify: same commit success and verified artifact evidence
operations.recovery: needs_attention on mismatch/unknown; no merge retry by Agent
retry create only after confirmed absent; conflict needs_attention
confirmed files retained; absent file forward-fix; mismatch/unknown needs_attention; no --skip-existing inference

operations.expected_identity: v0.14.0 release with wheel+sdist exact digests
operations.query: query exact tag release and asset digests
operations.verify: one release and all exact assets
operations.recovery: continue absent asset only when unambiguous; conflict/unknown needs_attention

operations.expected_identity: installed louke public outlets report 0.14.0 and reviewed prompt/registry identities
operations.query: install published artifacts in clean environment and read outlets
operations.verify: CLI, metadata, prompt and registry readback exact
operations.recovery: forward-fix diagnosis; immutable artifact mismatch cannot be overwritten

preconditions: candidate registry/prompts active and read back
payload.idempotency: stable operation_id=release+kind+target; immutable tag/registry version never overwritten
payload.partial_success: preserve confirmed facts; continue only uniquely absent safe operations; unknown/ambiguous stops needs_attention
payload.post_publish_verification: clean-install both published artifact types and compare CLI/metadata/prompt/registry outlets

deployment.reason: Louke is a local Python package; no independent deployment endpoint
